hooks.command: bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/block-docker-privesc.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/block-merged-pr-commit.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/inject-where-are-we.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/refresh-where-are-we-on-end.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
